curation_notes: Patch commit 18abeda fixes double-free in move_elements implementations in src/traits.rs. The vulnerable code used ptr::read to read elements from arrays and boxed slices while calling a user-provided closure, then called forget(self) only after all elements were consumed. A panic in the closure would cause already-read elements to be dropped twice. The fix replaces the unsafe ptr::read loop with a safe ArrayIter (new file src/array_iter.rs) for array sources and into_vec() for boxed slice sources. 3 non-test source files changed (traits.rs modified, array_iter.rs added, lib.rs module declaration), so noisy_patch is false. Locations derived from the patch diff targeting the move_elements function in src/traits.rs.
